title: Create a new account and reach the dashboard
description: A new user can sign up with email and password and arrive on the dashboard after account creation.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth
Switch to sign up mode
Fill in the name field with a valid display name
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the form
Verify the dashboard is displayed

title: Sign in and reach the dashboard
description: An existing user can sign in with email and password and arrive on the dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth
Switch to sign in mode
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the form
Verify the dashboard is displayed

title: Start a session from the dashboard
description: A signed-in tester can enter the app under test details and start a loop session, resulting in an active session on the dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign in form
Navigate to /dashboard
Fill in the app URL field with a valid app URL
Fill in the project ID field with a valid project ID
Start the session
Verify the session is active
Verify live loop data is displayed

title: Inspect the live dashboard overview
description: A signed-in user can open the dashboard and see the Write, Verify, Result panels, timeline, and stat tiles.

steps.description: Navigate to /dashboard
Verify the Write, Verify, and Result panels are displayed
Verify the loop timeline and stat tiles are displayed

title: End an active session from the dashboard
description: A signed-in tester can end an active session and see the dashboard return to an inactive completed state.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign in form
Navigate to /dashboard
Fill in the app URL field with a valid app URL
Fill in the project ID field with a valid project ID
Start the session
End the session
Verify the session is completed
Verify the session is inactive

title: Review live loop progress updates
description: A user can watch the loop stream update through the Write, Verify, and Result stages as the session progresses.

steps.description: Navigate to /dashboard
Verify the current loop stage is displayed in the Write panel
Verify the loop timeline updates with new iterations

title: Simulate a new iteration during an active session
description: A signed-in tester can add a simulated iteration during an active session and see the new iteration appear in the dashboard panels and timeline.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign in form
Navigate to /dashboard
Fill in the app URL field with a valid app URL
Fill in the project ID field with a valid project ID
Start the session
Simulate an iteration
Verify a new iteration is displayed
Verify the timeline updates with the new iteration

title: See the unauthenticated dashboard demo state
description: A signed-out visitor can open the dashboard and see the demo loop with a prompt to sign in.

steps.description: Navigate to /dashboard
Verify the demo loop is displayed
Verify a sign-in prompt is visible

title: Analyze a failed iteration for a fix suggestion
description: A signed-in tester can analyze a failed iteration and see AI root cause details with a suggested fix.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign in form
Navigate to /dashboard
Fill in the app URL field with a valid app URL
Fill in the project ID field with a valid project ID
Start the session
Simulate an iteration
Select the failed iteration
Analyze the failure
Verify AI failure analysis details are displayed
Verify a suggested fix snippet is displayed

title: Inspect a timeline iteration
description: A user can click a timeline block and see the selected iteration reflected in the dashboard panels.

steps.description: Navigate to /dashboard
Click a timeline block
Verify the selected iteration is displayed in the panels

title: Start a fresh session after ending the previous one
description: A signed-in tester can end one session and immediately start a new one from the dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign in form
Navigate to /dashboard
Fill in the app URL field with a valid app URL
Fill in the project ID field with a valid project ID
Start the session
End the session
Start a new session
Verify a new active session is displayed
Verify the previous session is no longer active

title: Inspect a specific iteration from the timeline
description: A signed-in tester can select an iteration in the dashboard timeline and view the corresponding details in the loop panels.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign in form
Navigate to /dashboard
Fill in the app URL field with a valid app URL
Fill in the project ID field with a valid project ID
Start the session
Simulate an iteration
Select the iteration in the timeline
Verify the selected iteration details are displayed
Verify the write, verify, and result panels reflect the selected iteration

title: Analyze a failed iteration with AI suggestions
description: A user can select a failed iteration and open the AI analysis view to review suggested fixes.

steps.description: Navigate to /dashboard
Click a failed timeline block
Run the AI fix analysis
Verify the failed iteration details are displayed
Verify AI fix suggestions are displayed

title: View past sessions in history
description: A signed-in user can open the history page and review previously run sessions with their key summary data.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign in form
Navigate to /history
Verify past sessions are displayed
Verify session summary data is displayed

title: Verify the dashboard summary tiles
description: A user can see the loop summary tiles reflecting total loops, passed loops, pass rate, and elapsed time.

steps.description: Navigate to /dashboard
Verify the total loops tile is displayed
Verify the passed loops, pass rate, and elapsed time tiles are displayed

title: Open a past session replay from history
description: A signed-in user can choose a past session in history and open its replay view.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign in form
Navigate to /history
Open a past session replay
Verify the replay view is displayed
Verify the selected session replay content is displayed

title: Generate a LOOP.md report from history
description: A signed-in user can generate a LOOP.md report from history and review the generated report in a modal.

steps.description: Navigate to /history
Generate the LOOP.md report
Verify the report preview modal is displayed
Verify the LOOP.md report content is displayed

title: Copy the suggested fix from failure analysis
description: A signed-in tester can copy the AI suggested fix after analyzing a failed iteration.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign in form
Navigate to /dashboard
Fill in the app URL field with a valid app URL
Fill in the project ID field with a valid project ID
Start the session
Simulate an iteration
Select the failed iteration
Analyze the failure
Copy the suggested fix
Verify the fix is available to copy
Verify the copied fix confirmation is visible

title: Step through a replay with playback controls
description: A signed-in user can step through a past session replay using the playback controls and scrubber.

steps.description: Navigate to /session/[id]
Advance the replay using playback controls
Move the scrubber to a different point in the replay
Verify the displayed iteration changes
Verify the replay remains visible

title: Open past sessions from history
description: A signed-in user can open the history page and view the list of past loop sessions.

steps.description: Navigate to /history
Verify the past sessions list is displayed
Verify a replay entry is available

title: Review replay progress with playback controls
description: A signed-in user can step through a session replay and scrub between iterations to inspect the run progression.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign in form
Navigate to /history
Open a past session replay
Use the playback controls to move through iterations
Scrub the replay timeline
Verify the displayed iteration changes with playback
Verify the replay scrubber reflects the selected point in time

title: Resume a past session from the first iteration
description: A signed-in user can open a past session replay and step through iterations one by one until the final iteration is shown.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign in form
Open a past session replay
Start replay playback
Step forward to the next iteration
Verify the replay advances through iterations and the current iteration view is shown

title: Open a session replay
description: A signed-in user can open a past session and reach its replay view.

steps.description: Navigate to /history
Open a past session replay
Verify the session replay is displayed

title: Generate and review a LOOP.md report

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}

Generate LOOP.md

title: Jump to a specific replay point with the scrubber
description: A signed-in user can drag the replay scrubber to jump directly to a later iteration in a past session.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign in form
Open a past session replay
Move the scrubber to a later point in the session
Verify the replay jumps to the selected iteration

title: Show an error for invalid sign-in credentials
description: A visitor who submits invalid credentials sees an inline authentication error and remains on the sign-in page.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth
Switch to sign in mode
Fill in the email field with an invalid email address
Fill in the password field with an invalid password
Submit the form
Verify an inline authentication error is visible

description: A signed-in user can open a past session and see the replay interface populated with iteration data.

description: A signed-in user can copy or download the generated LOOP.md report after opening the report preview.

Generate the LOOP.md report

Download the report

title: Open the landing page and start authentication
description: A visitor can view the landing page and begin the authentication flow from the primary start entry point.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the primary start option
Verify the authentication page is displayed

title: Save connection settings from empty form fields
description: A signed-in user can enter connection settings from an empty form and successfully save them.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign in form
Open the settings page
Fill in the TestSprite API key field with a valid value
Fill in the project ID field with a valid value
Fill in the app URL field with a valid value
Save the settings
Verify a success confirmation is visible
Verify the settings fields are populated

title: Save integration settings
description: A signed-in user can save the TestSprite API key, project ID, and app URL on the settings page.

steps.description: Navigate to /settings
Fill in the API key field with a valid value
Fill in the project ID field with a valid value
Fill in the app URL field with a valid URL
Save the settings
Verify the saved settings confirmation is visible

title: Save settings and keep them after reload
description: A signed-in user can save API key, project ID, and app URL settings and see them persist after reloading the page.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign in form
Navigate to /settings
Fill in the API key field with a valid API key
Fill in the project ID field with a valid project ID
Fill in the app URL field with a valid app URL
Save the settings
Reload the page
Verify the saved settings values are still present
Verify a saved confirmation is visible

title: Open the landing page and go to the dashboard
description: A visitor can view the landing page and reach the dashboard from the dashboard entry point.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the dashboard link
Verify the dashboard is displayed

title: Retain settings after reload
description: A signed-in user can reload the settings page and still see previously saved integration values.

steps.description: Navigate to /settings
Fill in the API key field with a valid value
Fill in the project ID field with a valid value
Fill in the app URL field with a valid URL
Save the settings
Reload the page
Verify the saved settings values are still populated

title: Retain settings after saving
description: A signed-in user can save TestSprite connection settings and see the values remain after reloading the page.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign in form
Open the settings page
Fill in the TestSprite API key field with a valid value
Fill in the project ID field with a valid value
Fill in the app URL field with a valid value
Save the settings
Reload the page
Verify a success confirmation is visible
Verify the saved connection values remain populated

title: Enter email verification code when prompted
description: If email verification is enabled during sign up, a user can enter the verification code and complete account creation.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth
Switch to sign up mode
Fill in the name field with a valid display name
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the form
Fill in the verification code field with a valid 6-digit code
Submit the form
Verify the dashboard is displayed

title: Show validation when settings contain invalid values
description: A signed-in user sees validation feedback when trying to save malformed settings values.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign in form
Navigate to /settings
Fill in the API key field with an invalid API key
Fill in the project ID field with an invalid project ID
Fill in the app URL field with an invalid app URL
Save the settings
Verify validation errors are visible
Verify the invalid settings are not saved

title: Update existing connection settings
description: A signed-in user can change previously saved TestSprite connection settings and see the updated values persist.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign in form
Open the settings page
Change the TestSprite API key field to a different valid value
Change the project ID field to a different valid value
Change the app URL field to a different valid value
Save the settings
Verify a success confirmation is visible
Verify the updated connection values remain populated

title: Keep partial settings unsaved until required fields are complete
description: A signed-in user can leave required settings incomplete and see validation that prevents saving partial integration data.

steps.description: Navigate to /settings
Fill in only the API key field with a valid value
Save the settings
Verify a validation error is visible
Verify the settings are not saved

title: View the landing page introduction content
description: A visitor can see the core landing page introduction content that explains the product.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Verify the landing page headline is displayed
Verify the loop phase cards are displayed

title: Keep partial settings empty without saving incomplete data
description: A signed-in user can leave optional settings blank and save only the provided configuration fields without breaking the form.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign in form
Navigate to /settings
Fill in the API key field with a valid API key
Leave the project ID field empty
Fill in the app URL field with a valid app URL
Save the settings
Verify the form saves successfully with partial values
Verify the empty field remains empty

title: Display validation for incomplete connection settings
description: A signed-in user cannot save connection settings when required fields are missing and should see validation feedback.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign in form
Open the settings page
Fill in the TestSprite API key field with a valid value
Save the settings
Verify a validation error is visible
Verify the settings are not saved

title: Show validation for an invalid app URL
description: A signed-in user sees validation when entering an invalid app URL in settings.

steps.description: Navigate to /settings
Fill in the API key field with a valid value
Fill in the project ID field with a valid value
Fill in the app URL field with an invalid URL
Save the settings
Verify the app URL validation error is visible

title: Keep partially entered settings unsaved until submission
description: A signed-in user can open the settings page, make partial edits, and remain on the page without a save confirmation until the form is submitted.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign in form
Open the settings page
Fill in the TestSprite API key field with a valid value
Verify the settings form remains open for editing
Verify no success confirmation is visible yet

title: See the placeholder failure artifact area
description: A user reviewing a failed iteration can see the placeholder screenshot area in the failure details.

steps.description: Navigate to /dashboard
Click a failed timeline block
Verify the failure artifact area is displayed
Verify the screenshot placeholder is displayed
